title: Votive Tablets.
content:
That which I learned from the Deity, 
    that which through lifetime hath helped me,
    Meekly and gratefully now, here I suspend in his shrine.
meaning:
"Votive Tablets." is a quintessential example of Friedrich Schiller's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
